ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the order was placed */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the order is to be delivered */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the order is to be delivered */,
  "pincode" INTEGER /* Postal code for the delivery address */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the delivery address */,
  "order_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the order was placed */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the order */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the order */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has opted in for marketing communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the product */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the product */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "total" REAL /* Total price for the quantity ordered */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the product */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the order detail */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the order detail */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping process */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the shipping record */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the shipping record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the shipping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being returned */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the product was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return process */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method of return */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the return record */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the return record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the return record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the vendor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the vendor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the vendor */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the vendor */,
  "pincode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the vendor */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the vendor */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the vendor record */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the vendor record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the vendor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_vendor" (
  "product_vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-vendor relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor */,
  "supply_price" REAL /* Price at which the vendor supplies the product */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity required from the vendor */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery from the vendor */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the product-vendor relationship */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the product-vendor relationship */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the product-vendor relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_vendor_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_vendor_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold at which the product should be reordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the threshold is reached */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the inventory record */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the inventory record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address for the warehouse manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the warehouse record */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the warehouse record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the warehouse record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "discount_percent" REAL /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promo_code" TEXT /* Promotional code */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to apply the promotion */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the promotion */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the promotion */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "response_by" TEXT /* User or system that responded to the feedback */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was responded to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the feedback */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the feedback */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
